summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The hydrated artifact marks the shard as non-security-sensitive, with no shared canonical; no close, merge, fix, or GitHub mutation is planned. Hydrated PRs are classified independently, and refs missing from the preflight artifact are scoped to needs_human because live target kind/updated_at state is unavailable.
